sb_prompt: FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLERS' PREFERENCE AND LEVEL OF INTEREST IN PERSONAL COMPUTERS.  HOW DOES IT COMPARE TO YOUR INTEREST AND PREFERENCE?
turns: So, do you have a personal computer at home?

I have a desktop computer. How about you?
I have a laptop, but I also use a desktop at work. So, what kind of activities do you use your personal computer for?
I use my personal computer for a variety of things, including work, browsing the internet, and playing games. What about you?

I use my laptop for a lot of the same things, like work, browsing the internet, and playing games. I also use it for video calls with friends and family. Do you use your personal computer for video calls?
